title: Assessment Report
description: An aggregated, structured summary of compliance state for a subject at a point in time. Produced by the assessment-generate workflow from collected evidence records. The input to gate evaluations. Lives in 09-assessments/reports/.

$schema.description: Schema reference for editor tooling. Not validated against the schema itself.

type.description: What kind of thing is being assessed.

identifier.description: Repository URL, service name, environment name, or release tag.

commit_sha.description: For repository and release assessments: the commit being assessed.

profile_id.description: The governing profile declared by the subject.

profile_version.description: Version of the profile at assessment time.

control_catalog_version.description: Git tag or SHA of platform-compliance used for this assessment.

evidence_window.description: The time range of evidence records included in this assessment.

control_results.description: One entry per in-scope control from the declared profile.

result.description: Result for this control in this assessment. pass: evidence shows compliance. fail: evidence shows non-compliance. manual_review: requires human judgement. not_applicable: scope condition false. waived: failing but active approved waiver exists. error: evidence collection error.

evidence_ids.description: UUIDs of evidence records contributing to this result.

failure_reason.description: Human-readable explanation when result is fail or error.

overall_result.description: pass: all mandatory in-scope controls pass or are not_applicable. fail: at least one mandatory control fails without a waiver. pass-with-waivers: all mandatory controls pass or are waived; active waivers exist. manual-review-required: one or more controls require human review before gate can pass. inconclusive: evidence missing for one or more mandatory controls.

gate_evaluation.description: Present when this assessment is tied to a specific gate evaluation.

blocking_controls.description: Control IDs that are blocking the gate (result: fail with enforcement: block).
